debug_info.goal:
a b c d s : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d
h₁ : s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
⊢ 1 < s ∧ s < 2

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  have hab : a + b > 0 := by linarith
  have hcd : c + d > 0 := by linarith

  have habd : a + b + d > 0 := by linarith
  have hbcd : b + c + d > 0 := by linarith
  have hacd : a + c + d > 0 := by linarith
  have habcd : a + b + c + d > 0 := by linarith

  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by

    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by

s < 2 := by linarith
  have lower : 1 < s := by
    have key1 : a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) > (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have denom1 : a + b + d < a + b + c + d := by linarith
      have denom2 : a + c + d < a + b + c + d := by linarith
      have sum_pos : a + b + c + d > 0 := by linarith
      have h' : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha sum_pos denom1
      have h'' : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd sum_pos denom2
      calc a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) 
          > a / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) := by linarith
        _ = (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [← add_div]
    have key2 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) > (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have denom1 : a + b + c < a + b + c + d := by linarith
      have denom2 : b + c + d < a + b + c + d := by linarith
      have sum_pos : a + b + c + d > 0 := by linarith
      have h' : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb sum_pos denom1
      have h'' : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc sum_pos denom2
      calc b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d)
          > b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) := by linarith
        _ = (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [← add_div]
    have sum_eq_one : (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      field_simp
      ring
    linarith
  exact ⟨lower, upper⟩

obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  have habd : 0 < a + b + d := by linarith
  have habc : 0 < a + b + c := by linarith
  have hbcd : 0 < b + c + d := by linarith
  have hacd : 0 < a + c + d := by linarith
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h3 : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h4 : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have hsum : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      field_simp
    linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) < (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      rw [div_lt_div_iff habd (by linarith)]
      ring_nf
      nlinarith
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) < (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      rw [div_lt_div_iff habc (by linarith)]
      ring_nf
      nlinarith
    have h3 : c / (b + c + d) < (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      rw [div_lt_div_iff hbcd (by linarith)]
      ring_nf
      nlinarith
    have h4 : d / (a + c + d) < (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      rw [div_lt_div_iff hacd (by linarith)]
      ring_nf
      nlinarith
    have hsum : (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) + (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) = 2 := by
      field_simp
      ring
    linarith

sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d, 
    sq_nonneg (a-b), sq_nonneg (a-c), sq_nonneg (a-d), sq_nonneg (b-c), 
    sq_nonneg (b-d), sq_nonneg (c-d), sq_nonneg (a+b), sq_nonneg (a+c),
    sq_nonneg (a+d), sq_nonneg (b+c), sq_nonneg (b+d), sq_nonneg (c+d)]

something, and b/(a+b+c) + c/(b+c+d) < 1 + something
  -- Actually: a/(a+b+d) + c/(b+c+d) and b/(a+b+c) + d/(a+c+d)
  have upper1 : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) < 1 := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) ≤ a / (a + d) := by
      apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (le_of_lt ha)
      · linarith
      · linarith
    have : c / (b + c + d) ≤ c / (c + d) := by
      apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (le_of_lt hc)
      · linarith
      · linarith
    calc a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) 
        < a / (a + d) + c / (c + d) := by
          apply add_lt_add
          · exact div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
          · exact div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
      _ = 1 := by field_simp; ring
  have upper2 : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) < 1 := by
    calc b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d)
        < b / (a + b) + d / (a + d) := by
          apply add_lt_add
          · exact div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
          · exact div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
      _ = 1 := by field_simp; ring
  have lower1 : a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) > 1/2 := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [div_add_div_same a b (a + b + c + d)]
  have lower2 : c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [div_add_div_same c d (a + b + c + d)]
  constructor
  · linarith
  · linarith

s < 2 := by linarith
  have pair1 : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) = (a * (b + c + d) + c * (a + b + d)) / ((a + b + d) * (b + c + d)) := by
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [this]
    rw [gt_iff_lt, div_lt_iff (by positivity), one_div]
    rw [inv_mul_lt_iff (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2)]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - c), sq_nonneg (b - d), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d]
  have pair2 : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) = (b * (a + c + d) + d * (a + b + c)) / ((a + b + c) * (a + c + d)) := by
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [this]
    rw [gt_iff_lt, div_lt_iff (by positivity), one_div]
    rw [inv_mul_lt_iff (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2)]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b - d), sq_nonneg (a - c), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d]
  constructor
  · calc s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) := h₁
      _ = (a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d)) + (b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d)) := by ring
      _ > 1/2 + 1/2 := by linarith
      _ = 1 := by norm_num
  · linarith

obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  have hab : a + b > 0 := by linarith
  have hcd : c + d > 0 := by linarith
  have habd : a + b + d > 0 := by linarith
  have habc : a + b + c > 0 := by linarith
  have hbcd : b + c + d > 0 := by linarith
  have hacd : a + c + d > 0 := by linarith
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) > (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
      linarith
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) > (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
      linarith
    have h3 : (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      field_simp
    linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h2 : d / (a + c + d) < d / (a + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h3 : b / (a + b + c) < b / (b + c) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h4 : c / (b + c + d) < c / (b + c) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h5 : a / (a + d) + d / (a + d) = 1 := by field_simp
    have h6 : b / (b + c) + c / (b + c) = 1 := by field_simp
    linarith

s < 2 := by linarith
  have p1 : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) > (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
    have := div_add_div_le_iff habd hbcd
    have key : a * (b + c + d) + c * (a + b + d) > (a + c) * (a + b + d) * (b + c + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      rw [gt_iff_lt, div_lt_iff (by linarith : 0 < a + b + c + d)]
      ring_nf
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d, sq_nonneg (a - c), sq_nonneg (b - d)]
    calc a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) 
        = (a * (b + c + d) + c * (a + b + d)) / ((a + b + d) * (b + c + d)) := by field_simp
      _ > (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
          rw [gt_iff_lt, div_lt_div_iff (by positivity) (by linarith)]
          ring_nf
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d]
  have p2 : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) > (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
    calc b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d)
        = (b * (a + c + d) + d * (a + b + c)) / ((a + b + c) * (a + c + d)) := by field_simp
      _ > (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
          rw [gt_iff_lt, div_lt_div_iff (by positivity) (by linarith)]
          ring_nf
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d]
  have lower : 1 < s := by
    calc s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) := h₁
      _ = (a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d)) + (b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d)) := by ring
      _ > (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by linarith
      _ = 1 := by field_simp
  exact ⟨lower, upper⟩

sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg d]
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) > (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have := div_add_div_le_iff habc hbcd
      field_simp at this ⊢
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b * d - a * c), sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c]
    calc a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
        = (a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d)) + (b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d)) := by ring
      _ > (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by linarith
      _ = 1 := by field_simp
  · rw [h₁]
    have ha1 : a / (a + b + d) < 1 := by rw [div_lt_one habd]; linarith
    have hb1 : b / (a + b + c) < 1 := by rw [div_lt_one habc]; linarith
    have hc1 : c / (b + c + d) < 1 := by rw [div_lt_one hbcd]; linarith
    have hd1 : d / (a + c + d) < 1 := by rw [div_lt_one hacd]; linarith
    have ha2 : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha habcd; linarith
    have hb2 : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb habcd; linarith
    have hc2 : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc habcd; linarith
    have hd2 : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd habcd; linarith
    have hsum : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      field_simp
    linarith

obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  have habd : 0 < a + b + d := by linarith
  have habc : 0 < a + b + c := by linarith
  have hbcd : 0 < b + c + d := by linarith
  have hacd : 0 < a + c + d := by linarith
  have habcd : 0 < a + b + c + d := by linarith
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha habcd; linarith
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb habcd; linarith
    have h3 : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc habcd; linarith
    have h4 : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd habcd; linarith
    have hsum : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      field_simp
    linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith : 0 < a + d); linarith
    have h2 : d / (a + c + d) < d / (a + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith : 0 < a + d); linarith
    have h3 : b / (a + b + c) < b / (b + c) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith : 0 < b + c); linarith
    have h4 : c / (b + c + d) < c / (b + c) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith : 0 < b + c); linarith
    have had : a / (a + d) + d / (a + d) = 1 := by field_simp

    linarith

so sum < 4, but we need < 2
  -- Key: a/(a+b+d) + d/(a+c+d) < 1 + something and b/(a+b+c) + c/(b+c+d) < 1 + something
  -- Actually: a/(a+b+d) + c/(b+c+d) < 1 and b/(a+b+c) + d/(a+c+d) < 1? No...
  -- Let's try: (a+d)/(a+b+d) + (b+c)/(b+c+d) and similar pairings
  have key1 : a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) < (a + d) / (a + d) := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : d / (a + c + d) < d / (a + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    calc a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) < a / (a + d) + d / (a + d) := by linarith
      _ = (a + d) / (a + d) := by rw [← add_div]
  have key2 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) < (b + c) / (b + c) := by
    have : b / (a + b + c) < b / (b + c) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : c / (b + c + d) < c / (b + c) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    calc b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) < b / (b + c) + c / (b + c) := by linarith
      _ = (b + c) / (b + c) := by rw [← add_div]
  rw [div_self (by linarith : a + d ≠ 0)] at key1
  rw [div_self (by linarith : b + c ≠ 0)] at key2
  have hs_lt : s < 2 := by linarith
  -- For s > 1: use that a/(a+b+d) > a/(a+b+c+d) etc, sum = 1
  have sum_eq : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
    field_simp
  have habcd : 0 < a + b + c + d := by linarith
  have l1 : a / (a + b + c + d) < a / (a + b + d) := by
    apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha habd (by linarith)
  have l2 : b / (a + b + c + d) < b / (a + b + c) := by
    apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb habc (by linarith)
  have l3 : c / (a + b + c + d) < c / (b + c + d) := by
    apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc hbcd (by linarith)
  have l4 : d / (a + b + c + d) < d / (a + c + d) := by
    apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd hacd (by linarith)
  have hs_gt : 1 < s := by linarith
  exact ⟨hs_gt, hs_lt⟩

similarly for b,c
  have key1 : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
      apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have hsum : a / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) = (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by ring
    have : (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) > 0 := div_pos (by linarith) (by linarith)
    nlinarith [div_pos ha (by linarith : 0 < a + b + c + d), div_pos hc (by linarith : 0 < a + b + c + d)]
  have key2 : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    nlinarith [div_pos hb (by linarith : 0 < a + b + c + d), div_pos hd (by linarith : 0 < a + b + c + d)]
  constructor
  · linarith
  · linarith

s < 2 := by linarith
  have key1 : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) = (a * (b + c + d) + c * (a + b + d)) / ((a + b + d) * (b + c + d)) := by
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [this]
    rw [div_gt_iff (by positivity)]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - c), sq_nonneg (a + c), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg d]
  have key2 : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) = (b * (a + c + d) + d * (a + b + c)) / ((a + b + c) * (a + c + d)) := by
      field_simp
      ring
    rw [this]
    rw [div_gt_iff (by positivity)]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b - d), sq_nonneg (b + d), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg d]
  constructor
  · linarith
  · linarith

s < 2 := by rw [h₁]; linarith
  have key1 : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : a / (a + b + d) + c / (b + c + d) = a * (b + c + d) / ((a + b + d) * (b + c + d)) + c * (a + b + d) / ((a + b + d) * (b + c + d)) := by
      field_simp
    rw [this]
    rw [← add_div]
    rw [div_gt_iff (by positivity : (a + b + d) * (b + c + d) > 0)]
    ring_nf
    have h5 : (a + b + d) * (b + c + d) = b^2 + b*c + b*d + a*b + a*c + a*d + b*d + c*d + d^2 := by ring
    have h6 : 2 * (a * (b + c + d) + c * (a + b + d)) = 2*a*b + 2*a*c + 2*a*d + 2*b*c + 2*c*d + 2*c*d := by ring
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - c), sq_nonneg (b - d), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d, sq_nonneg (a + c - b - d)]
  have key2 : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) > 1/2 := by
    have : b / (a + b + c) + d / (a + c + d) = b * (a + c + d) / ((a + b + c) * (a + c + d)) + d * (a + b + c) / ((a + b + c) * (a + c + d)) := by
      field_simp
    rw [this]
    rw [← add_div]
    rw [div_gt_iff (by positivity : (a + b + c) * (a + c + d) > 0)]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b - d), sq_nonneg (a - c), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d, sq_nonneg (b + d - a - c)]
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]; linarith
  · exact hs_lt_2

s < 2 := by rw [h₁]; linarith
  have lower : 1 < s := by
    rw [h₁]
    have eq1 : a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) > (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have h5 : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have h6 : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have h7 : a / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by
        field_simp
      linarith
    have eq2 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) > (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
      have h5 : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have h6 : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by
        apply div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
      have h7 : b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) = (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by
        field_simp
      linarith
    have h8 : (a + d) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + c) / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      field_simp
    linarith
  exact ⟨lower, upper⟩

sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg d]
  have h2 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) > 1 / 2 := by
    field_simp
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c]
  have h3 : a / (a + b + d) + d / (a + c + d) < 1 := by
    have ha1 : a / (a + b + d) < 1 := by rw [div_lt_one habd]; linarith
    have hd1 : d / (a + c + d) < 1 := by rw [div_lt_one hacd]; linarith
    have ha2 : a / (a + b + d) ≤ a / (a + d) := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have hd2 : d / (a + c + d) ≤ d / (a + d) := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : a / (a + d) + d / (a + d) = 1 := by field_simp
    linarith
  have h4 : b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) < 1 := by
    have hb2 : b / (a + b + c) ≤ b / (b + c) := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have hc2 : c / (b + c + d) ≤ c / (b + c) := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : b / (b + c) + c / (b + c) = 1 := by field_simp
    linarith
  constructor <;> linarith
